gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation. The Bash script uses robust error handling (set -euo pipefail, die) and localized variables. The workflow correctly uses least-privilege permissions and safely builds arguments using arrays (lines 30-46) to handle optional policy flags.
